case_title: ANIA, INC VS. BARNEY'S GOURMET HAMBURGERS, INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ADEL MORADI--VICE PRESIDENT/OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KAMRAN & CIAMAC--MANAGERS. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ANIA, INC DBA FILTA ENVIRONMENTAL KICHEN SOLUTION RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BARNEY'S GOURMET HAMBURGERS, INC (AGENT: ALBERT SARSHAR) $3,035.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,085.00, THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF OCT-07-2013. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:23AM
JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOT MYLES, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ, NOTHING ON RECORD. DEPT 525.
CAUSE CALLED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APPELLANT, DOES NOT APPEAR. RESPONDENT, ANIA, INC. DBA FILTA ENVIRONMENTAL KITCHEN SOLUTION APPEARS BY ADEL MORADI/OWNER. APPELLANT NOT PRESENT, AND THEREFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOT MYLES INSTRUCTS RESPONDENT THAT HE WILL HEAR MATTER AS A DEFAULT PROVE UP HEARING. PARTIES, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TESTIFY IN THE NARRATIVE AND RESPOND TO QUESTIONS FROM JUDGE MYLES.

9:26AM
MATTER IS SUBMITTED.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
